chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D - 2003 of 2026 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7951/2026 2. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 3. For orders on CMA No.7952/2026 4. For hearing of main case 31.03.2026 Mr. Raj Ali Wahid, Advocate for the petitioner. ------------------------------------ 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Through this petition, the petitioner, who is presently residing abroad, has sought transitory bail to enable him to surrender before the trial Court. It is submitted by learned counsel for the applicant that in the year 2021 an FIR bearing No.36/2021 under Sections 420, 468, 471, 467, 506 & 34 PPC was registered at Police Station Artillery Maidan, Karachi against the petitioner and others and after completion of investigation, the challan has been submitted before the trial Court. It is further submitted that in the challan, the petitioner’s name was placed in column-II showing him as absconder. It is submitted that by taking cognizance of the said challan, the learned trial Court issued NBWs against the petitioner and after completing the necessary formalities he was declared as proclaimed offender and a Red Notice was issued through the National Central Bureau, Interpol. Per learned counsel, on account of said Red Notice, name of the petitioner has been placed on the Stop List. It is submitted by learned counsel that the petitioner had no knowledge about the pendency of the above said criminal case as he was never served ever any kind of process; however, now upon knowing about the aforesaid criminal case, the petitioner wants to surrender himself before the learned trial Court.

Per learned counsel, on account of said Red Notice, name of the petitioner has been placed on the Stop List. It is submitted by learned counsel that the petitioner had no knowledge about the pendency of the above said criminal case as he was never served ever any kind of process; however, now upon knowing about the aforesaid criminal case, the petitioner wants to surrender himself before the learned trial Court. Without touching the merits of the case, the petitioner is granted transitory bail to enable him to appear before the competent Court at Karachi within a period of fourteen days on his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/- (Rupees one lac only) and P.R. Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Nazir of this Court. This transitory bail shall remain in force for 14 days from today or the date on which the petitioner will surrender himself before the trial court, whichever is earlier. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE
